name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates and renewals.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
features: monthly alert summaries of upcoming renewals

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates and renewals.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates and renewals
must_have_features: monthly alert summaries of upcoming renewals

one_liner: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates and renewals.
